summary: Keep #74905 as the canonical adopted PR and emit a bounded same-branch repair artifact. The PR is open and useful, but exact-head ClawSweeper review still blocks merge-readiness with an APNs proxy-validation finding; merge and close are disabled by this job. Route linked #77126 to central security triage only.

actions.reason: Canonical adopted PR is useful but not merge-ready. The safe path is a bounded same-branch repair/review loop that preserves @jesse-merhi's source work and resolves or disproves the exact ClawSweeper/Copilot blockers.
A narrow repair artifact is required so the executor can update or validate the existing contributor branch without replacing the PR or losing contributor credit.
Route #77126 to central OpenClaw security handling; do not repair, merge, close, or comment on it from this ClawSweeper Repair job.
